title: `SpatialData.plot`
text: SpatialData package contains set reader plotting functions spatial omics data stored SpatialData .zarr files follow OME-NGFF specs. SpatialData object composed five layers: images, labels, shapes, points, tables. layer may contain arbitrary number elements. Images labels represented ZarrArrays (Rarr). Points shapes represented arrow objects linked -disk .parquet file. , data represented memory. Element annotation well cross-layer summarizations (e.g., count matrices) represented SingleCellExperiment tables.
code: x <- file.path("extdata", "blobs.zarr") x <- system.file(x, package="SpatialData") (x <- readSpatialData(x)) ## class: SpatialData ## - images(2): ##   - blobs_image (3,64,64) ##   - blobs_multiscale_image (3,64,64) ## - labels(2): ##   - blobs_labels (64,64) ##   - blobs_multiscale_labels (64,64) ## - points(1): ##   - blobs_points (200) ## - shapes(3): ##   - blobs_circles (5,circle) ##   - blobs_multipolygons (2,polygon) ##   - blobs_polygons (5,polygon) ## - tables(1): ##   - table (3,10) [blobs_labels] ## coordinate systems(5): ## - global(8): blobs_image blobs_multiscale_image ... blobs_polygons ##   blobs_points ## - scale(1): blobs_labels ## - translation(1): blobs_labels ## - affine(1): blobs_labels ## - sequence(1): blobs_labels

title: `SpatialData.plot`
text: Image/LabelArrays linked potentially multiscale .zarr stores. show method includes scales available given element: Internally, multiscale ImageArrays stored list ZarrArray, e.g.: retrieve specific scale’s ZarrArray, can use data(., k), k specifies target scale. also works plotting:
code: image(x, "blobs_image") ## class:  SpatialDataImage   ## Scales (1): (3,64,64) image(x, "blobs_multiscale_image") ## class:  SpatialDataImage (MultiScale)  ## Scales (3): (3,64,64 3,32,32 3,16,16) i <- image(x, "blobs_multiscale_image") vapply(data(i, k=NULL), dim, numeric(3)) ##      [,1] [,2] [,3] ## [1,]    3    3    3 ## [2,]   64   32   16 ## [3,]   64   32   16 wrap_plots(nrow=1, lapply(seq(3), \(.)      plotSpatialData() + plotImage(x, i=2, k=.)))

title: `SpatialData.plot`
code: i <- "blobs_labels" t <- getTable(x, i) t$id <- sample(letters, ncol(t)) table(x) <- t  p <- plotSpatialData() pal_d <- hcl.colors(10, "Spectral") pal_c <- hcl.colors(9, "Inferno")[-9]  a <- p + plotLabel(x, i, pal="grey")                   # binary b <- p + plotLabel(x, i, c="id", pal=pal_d)            # metadata c <- p + plotLabel(x, i, c="channel_1_sum", pal=pal_c) # assay  (a | b | c) +      plot_layout(guides="collect") &      theme(legend.position="bottom")

title: `SpatialData.plot`
code: i <- "blobs_points" a <- p + plotPoint(x, i) b <- p + plotPoint(x, i, col="genes")       # discrete c <- p + plotPoint(x, i, col="instance_id") # continuous (a | b | c)

title: `SpatialData.plot`
code: p <- plotSpatialData() a <- p +   ggtitle("polygons") +   plotShape(x, "blobs_polygons") b <- p +   ggtitle("multipolygons") +   plotShape(x, "blobs_multipolygons") c <- p +   ggtitle("circles") +   plotShape(x, "blobs_circles") (a | b | c)

title: `SpatialData.plot`
code: p <- plotSpatialData() # joint all <- p +     plotImage(x) +     plotLabel(x, a=1/3) +     plotShape(x, 1) +     plotShape(x, 3) +     new_scale_color() +     plotPoint(x, col="genes") +     ggtitle("layered") # split one <- list(     p + plotImage(x) + ggtitle("image"),     p + plotLabel(x) + ggtitle("labels"),     p + plotShape(x, 1) + ggtitle("circles"),     p + plotShape(x, 3) + ggtitle("polygons"),     p + plotPoint(x, col="genes") + ggtitle("points")) wrap_plots(c(list(all), one), nrow=2)

title: `SpatialData.plot`
text: example data, label shape polygons. labels morphological regions annotated pathologists. 2389 cells, 3,714,642 molecules, downsample random subset 1,000 visualization:
code: dir.create(td <- tempfile()) pa <- get_demo_SDdata("merfish") (x <- readSpatialData(pa)) ## class: SpatialData ## - images(1): ##   - rasterized (1,522,575) ## - labels(0): ## - points(1): ##   - single_molecule (3714642) ## - shapes(2): ##   - anatomical (6,polygon) ##   - cells (2389,circle) ## - tables(1): ##   - table (268,2389) [cells] ## coordinate systems(1): ## - global(4): rasterized anatomical cells single_molecule # layered visualization plotSpatialData() +     plotImage(x, c="white") +     plotPoint(x, n=1e3, col="cell_type", size=0.5) +     scale_color_manual(values=rainbow(8)) +     guides(col=guide_legend(override.aes=list(size=2))) +     plotShape(x, i="anatomical", fill=NA, col="white", linewidth=1) # subset & downsample for speed y <- x[c("images", "points"), ] n <- length(point(y)) i <- sample(n, 1e5) point(y) <- point(y)[i] # polygon queries lapply(seq_along(shape(x)), \(s) {     df <- data(shape(x)[s, ])     z <- crop(y, sf::st_as_sf(df))     plotSpatialData() +          plotImage(z) +         plotPoint(z, n=1e3, size=1/3, col="cyan") }) |> wrap_plots(nrow=2) & theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45, hjust=1))

title: `SpatialData.plot`
code: (x <- ColorectalCarcinomaMIBITOF()) ## class: SpatialData ## - images(3): ##   - point16_image (3,1024,1024) ##   - point23_image (3,1024,1024) ##   - point8_image (3,1024,1024) ## - labels(3): ##   - point16_labels (1024,1024) ##   - point23_labels (1024,1024) ##   - point8_labels (1024,1024) ## - points(0): ## - shapes(0): ## - tables(1): ##   - table (36,3309) [] ## coordinate systems(3): ## - point16(2): point16_image point16_labels ## - point23(2): point23_image point23_labels ## - point8(2): point8_image point8_labels ps <- lapply(imageNames(x), \(i) plotSpatialData() + plotImage(x, i) + ggtitle(i)) wrap_plots(ps, nrow=1) # bounding-box query bb <- list(     xmin=0, xmax=800,      ymin=500, ymax=900) y <- crop(x["images", 1], bb) plotSpatialData() + plotImage(y)

title: SpatialData visualization
text: DEMO vignette examples rely data deposited Bioconductor’s OSN bucket. interrogate , need install paws; necessary retrievals.

title: `SpatialData` .zarr toy datasets — blobs
code: x <- file.path("extdata", "blobs.zarr") x <- system.file(x, package="SpatialData") (x <- readSpatialData(x)) #> class: SpatialData #> - images(2): #>   - blobs_image (3,64,64) #>   - blobs_multiscale_image (3,64,64) #> - labels(2): #>   - blobs_labels (64,64) #>   - blobs_multiscale_labels (64,64) #> - points(1): #>   - blobs_points (200) #> - shapes(3): #>   - blobs_circles (5,circle) #>   - blobs_multipolygons (2,polygon) #>   - blobs_polygons (5,polygon) #> - tables(1): #>   - table (3,10) [blobs_labels] #> coordinate systems(5): #> - global(8): blobs_image blobs_multiscale_image ... blobs_polygons #>   blobs_points #> - scale(1): blobs_labels #> - translation(1): blobs_labels #> - affine(1): blobs_labels #> - sequence(1): blobs_labels

title: SpatialData point/shape viz. — plotFrame
code: # S4 method for class 'SpatialData' plotShape(x, i = 1, j = 1, assay = 1, ...)  # S4 method for class 'SpatialData' plotPoint(x, i = 1, j = 1, ...)

title: SpatialData point/shape viz. — plotFrame
text: x SpatialData object. character string index; label element plot. assay character string; case c denoting row name, specifies assay data use (see valTable). (ignored x SpatialDataPoint).

title: SpatialData point/shape viz. — plotFrame
code: x <- file.path("extdata", "blobs.zarr") x <- system.file(x, package="SpatialData") x <- readSpatialData(x)  # shapes p <- plotSpatialData() a <- p + plotShape(x, "blobs_polygons") #> Coordinate system already present. #> ℹ Adding new coordinate system, which will replace the existing one. b <- p + plotShape(x, "blobs_multipolygons") #> Coordinate system already present. #> ℹ Adding new coordinate system, which will replace the existing one. c <- p + plotShape(x, "blobs_circles") #> Coordinate system already present. #> ℹ Adding new coordinate system, which will replace the existing one. patchwork::wrap_plots(a, b, c)   # layered p +   plotShape(x, "blobs_circles", fill="pink") +   plotShape(x, "blobs_polygons", colour="red") #> Coordinate system already present. #> ℹ Adding new coordinate system, which will replace the existing one. #> Coordinate system already present. #> ℹ Adding new coordinate system, which will replace the existing one.  patchwork::wrap_plots(a, b)   # points i <- "blobs_points" p <- plotSpatialData() p + plotPoint(x, i)                       # simple #> Coordinate system already present. #> ℹ Adding new coordinate system, which will replace the existing one.  p + plotPoint(x, i, colour="genes")       # discrete #> Don't know how to automatically pick scale for object of type <NULL>. #> Defaulting to continuous. #> Coordinate system already present. #> ℹ Adding new coordinate system, which will replace the existing one.  p + plotPoint(x, i, colour="instance_id") # continuous #> Don't know how to automatically pick scale for object of type <NULL>. #> Defaulting to continuous. #> Coordinate system already present. #> ℹ Adding new coordinate system, which will replace the existing one.

title: SpatialData image viz. — plotImage
code: # S4 method for class 'SpatialData' plotImage(x, i = 1, j = 1, k = NULL, ch = NULL, c = NULL, cl = NULL)  plotSpatialData()

title: SpatialData image viz. — plotImage
text: x SpatialData object. element use given layer. j name target coordinate system. k index scale image; default (NULL), auto-select scale order minimize memory-usage blurring target size 800 x 800px; use Inf plot lowest resolution available. ch image channel(s) used plotting (defaults first channel(s) available); use channels() see channels available given SpatialDataImage c character vector; colors use channel. cl list length-2 numeric vectors (non-negative, increasing); specifies channel-wise contrast limits - defaults [0, 1] (ignored image(x, ) RGB image; convenience, NULL = [0, 1], n = [0, n]).

title: SpatialData image viz. — plotImage
code: x <- file.path("extdata", "blobs.zarr") x <- system.file(x, package="SpatialData") x <- readSpatialData(x, tables=FALSE)  ms <- lapply(seq(3), \(.)    plotSpatialData() +   plotImage(x, i=2, k=.)) patchwork::wrap_plots(ms)   # custom colors cmy <- c("cyan", "magenta", "yellow") plotSpatialData() + plotImage(x, c=cmy)   # contrast limits cl <- rep(list(c(0, 1/3)), 3) plotSpatialData() + plotImage(x, k=1, c=cmy, cl=cl)

title: SpatialData label viz. — plotLabel
code: # S4 method for class 'SpatialData' plotLabel(   x,   i = 1,   j = 1,   k = NULL,   c = NULL,   a = 0.5,   pal = c("red", "green"),   nan = NA,   assay = 1 )

title: SpatialData label viz. — plotLabel
text: x SpatialData object. character string index; label element plot. j name target coordinate system. k index scale image; default (NULL), auto-select scale order minimize memory-usage blurring target size 800 x 800px; use Inf plot lowest resolution available. c default, NULL, gives binary image whether given pixel non-zero; alternatively, character string specifying colData column row name table annotating . scalar numeric [0, 1]; alpha value passed geom_tile. pal character vector; color discrete/continuous values (interpolated automatically insufficient values provided). nan character string; color missing values (hidden default). assay character string; case c denoting row name, specifies assay data use (see valTable).

title: SpatialData label viz. — plotLabel
code: x <- system.file("extdata", "blobs.zarr", package="SpatialData") x <- readSpatialData(x)  i <- "blobs_labels" p <- plotSpatialData()  # simple binary image p + plotLabel(x, i)   # mock up some extra data t <- getTable(x, i) t$id <- sample(letters, ncol(t)) table(x) <- t  # coloring by 'colData' n <- length(unique(t$id))  # pal <- hcl.colors(n, "Spectral") pal_d <- hcl.colors(10, "Spectral") p + plotLabel(x, i, c="id", pal=pal_d)   # coloring by 'assay' data p + plotLabel(x, i, c="channel_1_sum")
